# Shared Fixture Title

This is the AUX-space duplicate title target. It mirrors the CX title but has distinct content and cross-space links.

| Space   | Reference                                                | Comment                     |
|:--------|:---------------------------------------------------------|:----------------------------|
| AUX     | [Shared Fixture Title](/display/CX/Shared+Fixture+Title) | points back to CX duplicate |
| AUX     | [CX Root](/display/CX/CX+Root)                           | root backlink               |
| AUX     | [[Missing AUX Duplicate]]                                | unresolved in AUX context   |

Values include 0, 1, many, AUX-0001, version 2.0.0, and escaped XML \<duplicate-secondary\>.

1. First AUX duplicate point.
2. Second point with `auxDuplicate()`.
3. Third point with broken-duplicate-secondary://literal.

> [!IMPORTANT]
> AUX duplicate info links to [AUX Cross Space](/display/AUX/AUX+Cross+Space).

## Audit appendix

The appendix is synthetic review clutter: owner admin, reviewer nobody, date 2026-05-04, window 00:00-23:59, priority P0/P1/P2, and markers 0, 1, many. It intentionally repeats labels that real teams copy between pages.

| Audit field   | Value   | Reference                                       | Noise                   |
|:--------------|:--------|:------------------------------------------------|:------------------------|
| primary       | 0       | [[Messy Links Page]]                            | appendix-zero           |
| secondary     | 1       | [[CX Linked]]                                   | appendix-one            |
| overflow      | many    | [AUX Cross Space](/display/AUX/AUX+Cross+Space) | appendix-many           |
| stale         | missing | [[Missing Appendix Target]]                     | broken-appendix://value |

Appendix prose includes escaped XML \<appendix attr="value"\>, Cyrillic пример, inline `appendixCheck()`, and code literal `/display/CX/Missing Appendix Literal`.

Secondary duplicate density tail: AUX duplicate, CX duplicate, zero trusted resolution without context, one title string, many candidate pages, and broken-duplicate-secondary-tail://literal.
